# kCGImagePropertyCIFFDictionary

**Global Variable**

A dictionary of key-value pairs for an image that uses Camera Image File Format (CIFF).

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyCIFFDictionary: CFString
```

## Discussion

For more information about the available metadata keys, see [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/ciff-image-properties].
